action.reasoning: The task requires producing localized content for six distinct markets, which involves significant independent work per market (translation, cultural adaptation, local pricing norms). This naturally decomposes into parallel subtasks. After all markets are complete, a global consistency review is needed, which depends on all prior outputs. I will spawn one agent per market to handle the localization, and take the integration/review role myself to ensure consistency and compile the final deliverables.

subtasks.goal: Produce localized launch kit for the US market.
subtasks.capsule: This agent creates the announcement post, FAQ, and pricing page copy tailored for the US audience. It serves the ROOT GOAL by delivering the first of six required market-specific launch kits.

outputs.description: Localized announcement post for US.
Localized FAQ for US.
Localized pricing page copy for US.

Localized FAQ for US.
Localized pricing page copy for US.

action.reasoning: The task requires producing three distinct but related marketing artifacts (announcement post, FAQ, pricing page copy) for a single market (US). Since the product details are not provided in shared memory, I must assume a generic but plausible SaaS product context to fulfill the request. These three artifacts are independent enough to be generated in parallel by sub-agents, which will speed up execution. I will spawn three subtasks, one for each artifact, and take on a self-role to review and ensure consistency across the generated content before finalizing the outputs.

subtasks.goal: Write the localized announcement post for the US market.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask generates the main announcement post tailored to US cultural and linguistic norms. It serves the ROOT GOAL by providing the primary communication piece for the US launch kit.

outputs.description: Draft of the US announcement post.

subtasks.goal: Write the localized FAQ for the US market.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask generates a comprehensive FAQ addressing common user questions, tailored to US expectations and terminology. It serves the ROOT GOAL by providing support content for the US launch kit.

outputs.description: Draft of the US FAQ.

subtasks.goal: Write the localized pricing page copy for the US market.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask generates persuasive pricing page copy, including tier descriptions and value propositions, tailored to the US market. It serves the ROOT GOAL by providing the conversion-focused content for the US launch kit.

outputs.description: Draft of the US pricing page copy.

self_role.goal: Review and finalize the US launch kit artifacts, ensuring consistency and quality.

outputs.description: Finalized localized announcement post for US.
